note: Warmup day — call and email each lead today so Tuesday in-person stops can open with "I am following up on my call/email." Tonight at 7pm the next batch (Tuesday in-person) generates automatically.

stops.name: Complete Roofing Solutions of Florida LLC
stops.leadInText: Do you ever feel like credit card processing is just an expense? What if it could work for you, rewarding your business with valuable perks like travel and electronics? Our new WPI Rewards program could be a game-changer for you.
stops.emailSubject: Quick question on processing for Complete Roofing Solutions of Florida LLC
stops.emailBody:
Hi there,

Local owner reaching out. I work with Wholesale Payments — we run a rewards program for roofing companies businesses where every dollar you process earns points toward travel, electronics, and other perks. No extra cost if you are at the qualifying rate.

Most roofing companies owners are paying way more in processing fees than they realize. I would like to drop by this week to introduce myself and run a quick rate check — no charge, no presentation, no commitment. Just a side-by-side of what your real cost looks like.

What is the best time to swing by?

Dave Ivery
Independent Sales Partner — Wholesale Payments Inc.
941-277-9876
admin@ownly1nce.com
the-ownly-breakthrough.vercel.app/
stops.phoneScript: Hi, this is Dave Ivery — local sales partner with Wholesale Payments. I work with roofing companies owners on cutting card-processing costs. We have a rewards program where every dollar you process earns points — free at the qualifying rate. Could I swing by this week for 5 minutes to run a quick rate comparison?
